latHint: Think a portion or share - not sliced meat.
pivHint: The deli cuts a SLICE of meat - but getting a SLICE of the profits means getting what?
winText: A fair portion. SLICE was the pivot - deli meat to a CHUNK of the profits.
lossText: CHUNK - a portion or share. SLICE was the pivot: deli SLICE to a CHUNK of the whole.
